settings.heading: Vsling Crossbow Sling for Treestand Hunting
settings.hero_text: Hands-free climb. Silent carry. Shoot with the sling on — the always-ready crossbow sling built for treestand hunters.
settings.cta_heading: Ready for your next treestand hunt?
settings.cta_subtext: The Vsling™ Crossbow/Gun Sling keeps your weapon hands-free, silent, and shoot-ready from the climb to the shot.
